mapper.sql: id, poNo, lineItem, invoiceNo, invoiceId, cnNo, transType, supplierId, replyOrderNo, replyOrderDate, replyExportDate, qtyTrans, qtyReceive, reasonRemark, dlvAnswerNo, produceFactory, produceHolon, errDescription, barCode, caseNo
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_purchaseReplyInfo
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_purchaseReplyInfo (id, poNo, lineItem, invoiceNo, invoiceId, cnNo, transType, supplierId, replyOrderNo, replyOrderDate, replyExportDate, qtyTrans, qtyReceive, reasonRemark, dlvAnswerNo, produceFactory, produceHolon, errDescription, barCode, caseNo) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lineitem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cnno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{supplierid,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{replyorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{replyorderdate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{replyexportdate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{qtytrans,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyreceive,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reasonremark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvanswerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{producefactory,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{produceholon,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{errdescription,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_purchaseReplyInfo
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
poNo = #{record.pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lineItem = #{record.lineitem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
invoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoiceId = #{record.invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
cnNo = #{record.cnno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
transType = #{record.transtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
supplierId = #{record.supplierid,jdbcType=CHAR},
replyOrderNo = #{record.replyorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
replyOrderDate = #{record.replyorderdate,jdbcType=DATE},
replyExportDate = #{record.replyexportdate,jdbcType=DATE},
qtyTrans = #{record.qtytrans,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qtyReceive = #{record.qtyreceive,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reasonRemark = #{record.reasonremark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dlvAnswerNo = #{record.dlvanswerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
produceFactory = #{record.producefactory,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
produceHolon = #{record.produceholon,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
errDescription = #{record.errdescription,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
barCode = #{record.barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
caseNo = #{record.caseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
